positive: A majestic bioluminescent forest canopy at twilight, featuring stylized, oversized flora and fauna. The central composition includes a whimsical, glowing pathway leading to a mystical source of light. The style should be highly detailed, vibrant neo-art deco mixed with psychedelic botanical illustration, using rich sapphire blues, deep emerald greens, and glowing turquoise accents. Emphasize clean, crisp silhouettes and high contrast between glowing elements and dark backgrounds. Composition must be symmetrical and highly scalable for apparel printing, suitable for repeat patterns. Include glowing geometric patterns naturally integrated into the leaves and trunks. Studio lighting, ultra-detailed, print-ready, vector art quality, high fidelity.
